board.name: Kitchen & Living Room Renovation
board.description: Full renovation of the main floor. Structural work, new kitchen cabinets, flooring, and painting. Move-out required during demolition phase.

tasks.name: Finalize kitchen layout
tasks.description: Decide between L-shaped vs galley layout. Island must have electrical and plumbing rough-ins.

tasks.name: Get renovation permit
tasks.description: City requires permit for structural wall removal. Budget 3-4 weeks for approval.

tasks.name: Get countertop quotes
tasks.description: Compare quartz vs granite vs solid surface. Request quotes from 3 fabricators including template and installation.

tasks.name: Order flooring samples
tasks.description: Engineered hardwood sample pack arriving Friday. Need to match with cabinet color samples.

tasks.name: Research appliance package deals
tasks.description: Check if buying fridge, oven, dishwasher as bundle saves 15% or more. Measure rough openings.

tasks.name: Get cabinet hardware samples
tasks.description: Order handle and knob samples in brushed nickel and matte black. See how they feel in hand.

tasks.name: Sign contract with general contractor
tasks.description: Review lien waivers and payment schedule. 30% upfront, 30% at midpoint, 30% at completion, 10% holdback.

tasks.name: Schedule electrician rough-in
tasks.description: Must happen before drywall. Need to run 220V line for induction cooktop and new circuits for kitchen island.

tasks.name: Book plumber for gas line
tasks.description: Moving gas stove to island. Need licensed plumber to relocate gas line and install shut-off valve.

tasks.name: Coordinate HVAC duct cleaning
tasks.description: Renovation will kick up dust. Schedule duct cleaning for week after drywall is finished.

tasks.name: Order dumpster permit for street placement
tasks.description: City requires permit if dumpster extends onto street or sidewalk. Apply at least 2 weeks in advance.

tasks.name: Rent dumpster
tasks.description: Order 10-yard dumpster for debris. Schedule delivery 1 day before demo starts. Confirm debris types allowed.

tasks.name: Remove old cabinets
tasks.description: Donate usable cabinets to Habitat for Humanity. Remove countertops carefully if selling on marketplace.

tasks.name: Pull up old flooring
tasks.description: Check for asbestos if house was built before 1980. Must test before removing old vinyl tiles.

tasks.name: Rough-in electrical wiring
tasks.description: Electrician on site Tuesday. Install junction boxes for under-cabinet lighting and island outlets.

tasks.name: Install insulation
tasks.description: R-value required for exterior wall: R-21. Use faced fiberglass batts. Vapor barrier on warm side of wall.

tasks.name: Frame new breakfast bar opening
tasks.description: Remove section of load-bearing wall. Temporary support beam installed. New LVL beam arrives Monday.

tasks.name: Run new plumbing lines for island sink
tasks.description: Trench under slab for hot and cold water lines. Drain line needs 1/4 inch per foot slope.

tasks.name: Schedule framing inspection
tasks.description: Must pass before insulation goes in. Check nailing pattern and header sizing.

tasks.name: Order kitchen cabinets
tasks.description: Custom shaker-style cabinets ordered. Lead time: 6 weeks. Delivery scheduled for week 7.

tasks.name: Select backsplash tile
tasks.description: Chose 3x6 subway tile in matte white. Ordered 10% extra for wastage and cuts.
